content.speakerText: Thanks for helping me out today!

options.text: No problem at all—good luck with your studies!
You're welcome, but I didn't do much.
Whatever, I have to go now.

content.explanation: 正确答案用积极语气表达感谢并送上祝福，符合道别收尾的礼貌原则。选项2和4态度冷漠，不符合社交礼仪；选项3虽然语法正确，但过度贬低自己的帮助，显得不真诚，不如正面回应自然。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your time today.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你今天抽出时间。

options.text: Of course, take care and let’s keep in touch!

content.explanation: 正确答案既表达了感谢，又用‘take care’和‘keep in touch’营造温暖的告别氛围。选项2语气随意，缺乏真诚；选项3削弱了对方的感激；选项4虽简洁但过于简短，缺乏情感温度。

content.speakerText: Thanks for everything—you’ve been a huge help!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的所有帮助，你真的帮了大忙！

options.text: It was my pleasure! Wishing you all the best!
I guess I should get going now.
Don’t mention it—I did it for the money.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用'It was my pleasure'这一高情商表达，搭配祝福语，完美收尾。选项2语气太随意，不适合正式感谢场景；选项3转移话题，回避回应；选项4内容不当，破坏信任感。

content.template: Thanks for helping me out today! — No problem at all—___ with your studies!
content.hint: 表达祝福时的常用搭配，常用于告别场景
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：good luck with...（祝福某人某事顺利）

content.template: I really appreciate your time today. ___ and let’s keep in touch!
content.hint: 道别时表达关心的常用短语，常用于正式或温暖的结束语
content.knowledgePoint: 道别固定搭配：Take care（保重）

content.template: Thanks for everything! It was ___ to help you.
content.hint: 高情商回应感谢的常用句型，比‘you’re welcome’更温暖
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：It was my pleasure（很乐意帮忙）

content.speakerText: Thanks for helping me out today!
expectedAnswers: No problem at all—good luck with your studies!
I really appreciate it! See you around!
You're welcome! Wishing you all the best in your new journey.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并表达积极祝福
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了'good luck', 'see you around', 'wishing you best'等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your time today.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你今天抽出时间。
expectedAnswers: Of course, take care and let’s keep in touch!
It was my pleasure—I’m glad I could help!
Thanks for saying that! Hope to see you again soon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并营造友好告别氛围
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的动词搭配和句型结构
表达自然度：是否避免机械套用，语气自然亲切
关键词覆盖：是否使用'take care', 'keep in touch', 'my pleasure', 'glad I could help'等表达

content.speakerText: Thanks for everything—you’ve been a huge help!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的所有帮助，你真的帮了大忙！
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure! Wishing you all the best!
I'm so happy I could help—don’t hesitate to reach out if you need anything!
Thank you for your kind words! Stay in touch!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否充分回应强烈感谢并传递温暖情感
语言准确性：是否使用高级表达如'it was my pleasure', 'wishing you all the best'
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度简短的回应
关键词覆盖：是否使用'it was my pleasure', 'wishing you best', 'stay in touch'等地道表达
